title: cardamine lucens
intro: Cardamine lucens, also known as Spring Cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and pungent aroma. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Spring Cress include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Spring Cress is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin irritations to respiratory problems.
